media_alt: 大五人格的大五人格中性占位图，不使用 MBTI 品牌视觉。
title: 大五人格
summary: 大五人格用开放性、尽责性、外向性、宜人性和神经质五个连续维度，帮助描述人格差异与沟通偏好。

media_alt: 开放性的大五人格中性占位图，不使用 MBTI 品牌视觉。
title: 开放性
summary: 开放性描述新经验、想象、审美、抽象想法和变化等稳定倾向，帮助理解学习、沟通和适应不同场景的方式。

media_alt: 尽责性的大五人格中性占位图，不使用 MBTI 品牌视觉。
title: 尽责性
summary: 尽责性描述秩序、自律、责任、计划、执行和审慎等稳定倾向，帮助理解学习、沟通和适应不同场景的方式。

media_alt: 外向性的大五人格中性占位图，不使用 MBTI 品牌视觉。
title: 外向性
summary: 外向性描述社交能量、表达、活动节奏、刺激需求和外部反馈等稳定倾向，帮助理解学习、沟通和适应不同场景的方式。

media_alt: 宜人性的大五人格中性占位图，不使用 MBTI 品牌视觉。
title: 宜人性
summary: 宜人性描述信任、合作、共情、边界、冲突和直接性等稳定倾向，帮助理解学习、沟通和适应不同场景的方式。

media_alt: 神经质 / 情绪敏感性的大五人格中性占位图，不使用 MBTI 品牌视觉。
title: 神经质 / 情绪敏感性
summary: 神经质 / 情绪敏感性描述压力反应、风险预警、情绪波动和恢复成本等稳定倾向，帮助理解学习、沟通和适应不同场景的方式。

media_alt: 高开放性的大五人格中性占位图，不使用 MBTI 品牌视觉。
title: 高开放性
summary: 高开放性描述探索新想法、尝试不同路径、保留想象空间的倾向；它不是优劣判断，而是帮助理解场景适配和沟通策略。

media_alt: 低开放性的大五人格中性占位图，不使用 MBTI 品牌视觉。
title: 低开放性
summary: 低开放性描述偏好熟悉路径、重视可验证经验、降低变化成本的倾向；它不是优劣判断，而是帮助理解场景适配和沟通策略。

media_alt: 高尽责性的大五人格中性占位图，不使用 MBTI 品牌视觉。
title: 高尽责性
summary: 高尽责性描述计划清楚、承诺稳定、提前检查风险的倾向；它不是优劣判断，而是帮助理解场景适配和沟通策略。

media_alt: 低尽责性的大五人格中性占位图，不使用 MBTI 品牌视觉。
title: 低尽责性
summary: 低尽责性描述保留弹性、减少过度控制、在变化中调整的倾向；它不是优劣判断，而是帮助理解场景适配和沟通策略。

media_alt: 高外向性的大五人格中性占位图，不使用 MBTI 品牌视觉。
title: 高外向性
summary: 高外向性描述通过互动获得能量、边说边整理想法、需要外部反馈的倾向；它不是优劣判断，而是帮助理解场景适配和沟通策略。

media_alt: 低外向性的大五人格中性占位图，不使用 MBTI 品牌视觉。
title: 低外向性
summary: 低外向性描述需要独处恢复、先内部整理、控制刺激量的倾向；它不是优劣判断，而是帮助理解场景适配和沟通策略。

media_alt: 高宜人性的大五人格中性占位图，不使用 MBTI 品牌视觉。
title: 高宜人性
summary: 高宜人性描述优先合作、关注他人感受、缓和冲突的倾向；它不是优劣判断，而是帮助理解场景适配和沟通策略。

media_alt: 低宜人性的大五人格中性占位图，不使用 MBTI 品牌视觉。
title: 低宜人性
summary: 低宜人性描述直接表达判断、保留边界、提出不同意见的倾向；它不是优劣判断，而是帮助理解场景适配和沟通策略。

media_alt: 高神经质 / 高情绪敏感性的大五人格中性占位图，不使用 MBTI 品牌视觉。
title: 高神经质 / 高情绪敏感性
summary: 高神经质 / 高情绪敏感性描述更早察觉风险、压力反应更强、恢复需要更多空间的倾向；它不是优劣判断，而是帮助理解场景适配和沟通策略。

media_alt: 情绪稳定性的大五人格中性占位图，不使用 MBTI 品牌视觉。
title: 情绪稳定性
summary: 情绪稳定性描述压力反应相对较低、恢复较快、不易长期维持高唤醒的倾向；它不是优劣判断，而是帮助理解场景适配和沟通策略。

media_alt: 大五人格 30 个细分面向的大五人格中性占位图，不使用 MBTI 品牌视觉。
title: 大五人格 30 个细分面向
summary: 30 个 facets 是大五五个维度下面的细分解释层，用来说明同一维度内部为什么会出现不同表现。

media_alt: Neutral Big Five placeholder visual for Big Five Personality; not an MBTI-branded image.
title: Big Five Personality
summary: The Big Five describes personality differences through five continuous dimensions: openness, conscientiousness, extraversion, agreeableness, and neuroticism.

media_alt: Neutral Big Five placeholder visual for Openness; not an MBTI-branded image.
title: Openness
summary: Openness describes stable tendencies around new experience, imagination, aesthetics, abstract ideas, and change, helping explain learning, communication, and adaptation patterns.

media_alt: Neutral Big Five placeholder visual for Conscientiousness; not an MBTI-branded image.
title: Conscientiousness
summary: Conscientiousness describes stable tendencies around order, self-discipline, responsibility, planning, execution, and deliberation, helping explain learning, communication, and adaptation patterns.

media_alt: Neutral Big Five placeholder visual for Extraversion; not an MBTI-branded image.
title: Extraversion
summary: Extraversion describes stable tendencies around social energy, expression, activity pace, stimulation, and external feedback, helping explain learning, communication, and adaptation patterns.

media_alt: Neutral Big Five placeholder visual for Agreeableness; not an MBTI-branded image.
title: Agreeableness
summary: Agreeableness describes stable tendencies around trust, cooperation, empathy, boundaries, conflict, and directness, helping explain learning, communication, and adaptation patterns.

media_alt: Neutral Big Five placeholder visual for Neuroticism / Emotional Sensitivity; not an MBTI-branded image.
title: Neuroticism / Emotional Sensitivity
summary: Neuroticism / Emotional Sensitivity describes stable tendencies around stress response, risk alerts, emotional shifts, and recovery cost, helping explain learning, communication, and adaptation patterns.

media_alt: Neutral Big Five placeholder visual for High Openness; not an MBTI-branded image.
title: High Openness
summary: High Openness describes tendencies around exploring new ideas, trying different paths, keeping room for imagination; it is not a rank, but a way to understand fit and communication strategy.

media_alt: Neutral Big Five placeholder visual for Low Openness; not an MBTI-branded image.
title: Low Openness
summary: Low Openness describes tendencies around preferring familiar paths, valuing tested experience, reducing change costs; it is not a rank, but a way to understand fit and communication strategy.

media_alt: Neutral Big Five placeholder visual for High Conscientiousness; not an MBTI-branded image.
title: High Conscientiousness
summary: High Conscientiousness describes tendencies around clear planning, stable commitments, checking risks early; it is not a rank, but a way to understand fit and communication strategy.

media_alt: Neutral Big Five placeholder visual for Low Conscientiousness; not an MBTI-branded image.
title: Low Conscientiousness
summary: Low Conscientiousness describes tendencies around keeping flexibility, reducing over-control, adjusting during change; it is not a rank, but a way to understand fit and communication strategy.

media_alt: Neutral Big Five placeholder visual for High Extraversion; not an MBTI-branded image.
title: High Extraversion
summary: High Extraversion describes tendencies around gaining energy through interaction, thinking aloud, using external feedback; it is not a rank, but a way to understand fit and communication strategy.

media_alt: Neutral Big Five placeholder visual for Low Extraversion; not an MBTI-branded image.
title: Low Extraversion
summary: Low Extraversion describes tendencies around needing solitude to recover, organizing internally first, controlling stimulation load; it is not a rank, but a way to understand fit and communication strategy.

media_alt: Neutral Big Five placeholder visual for High Agreeableness; not an MBTI-branded image.
title: High Agreeableness
summary: High Agreeableness describes tendencies around prioritizing cooperation, tracking others’ feelings, softening conflict; it is not a rank, but a way to understand fit and communication strategy.

media_alt: Neutral Big Five placeholder visual for Low Agreeableness; not an MBTI-branded image.
title: Low Agreeableness
summary: Low Agreeableness describes tendencies around stating judgments directly, keeping boundaries, raising disagreement; it is not a rank, but a way to understand fit and communication strategy.

media_alt: Neutral Big Five placeholder visual for High Neuroticism / High Emotional Sensitivity; not an MBTI-branded image.
title: High Neuroticism / High Emotional Sensitivity
summary: High Neuroticism / High Emotional Sensitivity describes tendencies around noticing risks earlier, stronger stress response, needing more recovery space; it is not a rank, but a way to understand fit and communication strategy.

media_alt: Neutral Big Five placeholder visual for Emotional Stability; not an MBTI-branded image.
title: Emotional Stability
summary: Emotional Stability describes tendencies around lower relative stress response, faster recovery, less sustained high arousal; it is not a rank, but a way to understand fit and communication strategy.

media_alt: Neutral Big Five placeholder visual for Big Five 30 Facets; not an MBTI-branded image.
title: Big Five 30 Facets
summary: The 30 facets are narrower explanations beneath the five Big Five domains, showing why people can differ inside the same broad trait.
